    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.p, {

      }), "\n", _jsxs(_components.li, {

    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.p, {
      children: "This split lets you adopt RxDB collection by collection. Start with the most offline-sensitive feature, point its queries at RxDB, and leave the rest of the app on Apollo until you decide to migrate."

        children: ["No. Apollo Client is a GraphQL client with an in-memory normalized cache. The cache can be persisted to storage through ", _jsx(_components.code, {
          children: "apollo-cache-persist"
        }), ", but it does not offer schema validation, migrations, indexes, or local query planning. RxDB is a database with a pluggable storage layer and replication built in."]
